headline: DaVita HealthCare (DVA) Exceeds Market Returns: Some Facts to Consider
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, DaVita HealthCare (DVA) stood at $152.42, denoting a +1.68% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: What to Expect From DaVita's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: DaVita is set to announce its first-quarter results in May, with analysts forecasting a double-digit increase in the company’s bottom-line figure.
